title: Forgotten Soul
description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Triggers after any card owned by you is exhausted. Selects a random hittable enemy and deals 1 damage. If there are no hittable enemies, no damage is dealt.
